creator: ale@FreeBSD.org
text:
The two .so files inside the jna.jar come from the official tarball, but we are actually building just a single arch specific .so in the port, that is inside the jna-platform.jar (that it's the one that jna should use).

At the moment AFAIK setting NO_ARCH doesn't provide many benefits, so I'm not worried too much about removing it, but all these intellij ports need to be fixed to install the right .so in the correct location, so that it can be really loaded.
